fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location of the inventory posting.

fields.name: Invt. Posting Group Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the inventory posting group, in the combination of location and inventory posting group, that you are setting up.

fields.name: Inventory Account
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the G/L account that item transactions with this combination of location and inventory posting group are posted to.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of a combination of inventory posting groups and locations.

fields.name: View All Accounts on Lookup
fields.tooltip: Specifies that all possible accounts are shown when you look up from a field. If the check box is not selected, then only accounts related to the involved account category are shown.

fields.name: Inventory Account (Interim)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the general ledger account to which to post transactions with the expected cost for items in this combination.

fields.name: WIP Account
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account number to which to post transactions for items in WIP inventory in this combination.

fields.name: Material Variance Account
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the general ledger account to which to post material variance transactions for items in this combination.

fields.name: Capacity Variance Account
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the general ledger account to which to post capacity variance transactions for items in this combination.

fields.name: Mfg. Overhead Variance Account
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account number to which to post manufacturing overhead variance transactions for items in this combination.

fields.name: Cap. Overhead Variance Account
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account number to which to post capacity overhead variance transactions for items in this combination.

fields.name: Subcontracted Variance Account
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account number to which to post subcontracted variance transactions for items in this combination.

fields.name: Mat. Non-Inv. Variance Acc.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the general ledger account number to which to post material non-inventory variance transactions for items in this combination.
